submit_script.purpose: build C1 (4q GHZ dephase, 100 shots), C2 (1q baseline, 50 shots), C3 (Bell sanity, 100 shots), submit to IonQ Forte 1

verifier_script.purpose: compute trapped-ion 4-qubit GHZ tau_2 from results JSON, ratio against PRNewswire SC reference, emit PASS/FAIL/INDETERMINATE
verifier_script.criterion: PASS if ratio in [0.67, 1.5] with p<0.05; FAIL if outside band; INDETERMINATE otherwise

launcher_shell.purpose: one-command launcher; auto-creates venv, installs SDK, runs submit

spec_md.purpose: human-readable round 2 summary cross-referencing first round spec + off-repo scripts

circuits_summary.purpose: GHZ dephase at delay=100us (F-N12-1 core); verifier injects ideal-prep contrast=1.0 prior at delay=0 for tau_2 fit. Direct two-delay measurement = $29.20 upgrade.

blockers_user_side: Forte 1 device ARN verification in Braket console (~5 min)
PRNewswire 2025-03 SC tau_2 reference value extraction (~15 min)
S3 bucket name discovery after Braket enable (~1 min)
IonQ Forte 1 windowed schedule wait after submit (1-3 days)
honest_c3: All four off-repo .py / .sh files written + tested for syntax. AWS onboarding entirely user-side (raw#9 hexa-only + ToS). Predicted Forte 1 ARN must be confirmed in console; if mismatch, user edits DEVICE_ARN_PREDICTED constant. Pulse-level delay implemented as identity-stack proxy (delay_us // 8) — true pulse-control requires device-specific Braket OpenQASM 3 support; CONFIRM_AT_USER_ONBOARDING.
